name: Cave Runner
short_description: It's not just "another game," it's a challenge, and I'm throwing it to you!
detailed_description:
Tired of the simplest platformers? I came to break your keyboards and check your nerves! It's not just "another game," it's a challenge, and I'm throwing it to you!
  • 50 challenging levels
Each movement will have to be perfected, before the level can be completed.
  • Complicated management
The usual control scheme is complicated by the presence of inertia and the physical size of the character. You will have to calculate each subsequent action.
Cards and online table of records in the next updates.
